commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=724d658ebc68a869bb14e9f7e576f4732fc8f893)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Telegram forwarded-message handling so direct and coalesced forward bursts keep clean agent body text while carrying forwarded attribution through typed untrusted metadata, with regression tests and a changelog entry.

PR surface: Source +115, Tests +428, Docs +1. Total +544 across 10 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main coalesces forwarded bursts into one synthetic message based on the first update, so per-item forwarded attribution cannot survive without a new structured path. I did not run a live Telegram reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed for live Telegram proof or a maintainer proof override; automation cannot supply the contributor's real Telegram setup evidence.
